metaTitle: Raccoon Removal NYC | Humane Raccoon Trapping | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Licensed raccoon removal and exclusion in NYC metro area. Humane trapping and relocation. NYS DEC certified wildlife specialists. Call now.
h1: Raccoon Removal in NYC — Licensed, Humane, and Permanent
heroParagraph: Raccoons in your attic, crawl space, or chimney are more than a nuisance — they cause serious structural damage, create fire hazards by disturbing insulation and electrical wiring, and can carry rabies and raccoon roundworm. Wildlife removal in New York State requires a NYS DEC Nuisance Wildlife Control license. Every raccoon specialist on our team is fully certified and follows all DEC guidelines for humane trapping, relocation, and exclusion.
